results.title: CENTURY TREASURE LTD AND ANOTHER V. OR PUI KWAN AND OTHERS
results.coram: Before: Hon Kwan VP and Chow JA in Court
results.parties: BETWEEN CENTURY TREASURE LIMITED 1 st Applicant UNIVERSAL SUPPORT LIMITED 2 nd Applicant and OR PUI KWAN (柯沛鈞) 1 st Respondent BOLD TEAM INVESTMENTS LIMITED (保添投資有限公司) 2 nd Respondent LIU KWONG PANG (廖廣鵬) 3 rd Respondent LEUNG YIN PING TITANIA (梁燕屏) 4 th Respondent LEUNG KAM LAM PETER (梁鑑林) 5 th Respondent LEUNG KAM HUNG DAVID (梁淦雄) 6 th Respondent LEUNG YIN PING TITANIA (梁燕屏), the Committee of the Estate of Leung Yin Ha (梁燕霞) 7 th Respondent
results.representations: Mr Y C Mok and Ms Julia Au, instructed by Mayer Brown, for the 1 st and 2 nd Applicants (Respondents) Mr Jin Pao SC and Mr Adrian Kwan, instructed by K M Lai & Li, for the 1 st Respondent (Applicant)
